title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Oberoi Realty Global Group

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Oberoi Realty Global Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Oberoi Realty Global Group are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Oberoi Realty Global Group:
Oberoi Realty Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Realty Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
